skills.name: Deal-to-Cash Pipeline Gap Detection
skills.description: Identifies critical blind spots in revenue execution—from deal closure to contract fulfillment and profitability tracking.
skills.what_it_does: Systematically scans the deal-to-cash workflow to detect where TAD can identify opportunities and close deals but cannot autonomously execute contracts or measure actual profitability. When triggered, it flags execution gaps that require human intervention or system integration, preventing false confidence in revenue realization and enabling targeted skill-building in autonomous contract management and real-time profit tracking.
